g.title: public.GroupPolicyPermissions:groupPolicyId->public.GroupPolicy:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY ("groupPolicyId") REFERENCES "GroupPolicy"(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE RESTRICT

g.title: public.GroupPolicyPermissions:orgId->public.Org:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY ("orgId") REFERENCES "Org"(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE RESTRICT
